If I had a car dealership, how would I do this? I would do the same thing, like you can buy this car anywhere, but if you buy a car here, first thing you need to get the car, second thing you need to get is, we're gonna send you and your family on a trip to Hawaii for a week to celebrate your new car, third thing you're gonna get is, I'm gonna let you do a five minute Skype session with some famous NASCAR dude, whatever, and I'm gonna, and create an offer now, it's like this $5,000 car, I can sell for $50,000, $100,000, $200,000, because I created an offer, okay? So that's what I'm thinking, like, what are all the cool things I can give somebody to get them this result right here, and that's what I'm gonna put into this offer that decommoditizes myself and gives me the chance to really charge whatever I want. Does that make sense, you guys? So that's the big secret, that's like, if you wanna see the magician behind the scenes. We were talking about this whole training program with Brandon, who's behind the camera right now, Brandon used to be a magician, and he said that one of the things that he, when he was a kid, he went to a magic show, and he saw one of his, his uncle or someone who was doing his magic tricks, and he was blown away, and then afterwards he took him behind the scenes, so let me show you how I do everything, he showed him behind the scenes how everything worked, and it became so much more cool to him. Like, what this whole day is about is to show you guys behind the scenes what makes this all work. It's not just putting together an off, like product this, this, this, this, this, this, like no, there's a strategy behind this. Like this is the tip of the iceberg people see and they try to copy me on. It's like, no, you missed the whole point. It comes back to you, like what's the market I'm serving? What's the red ocean I'm throwing rocks at? From there, what's the blue ocean I'm creating? Okay, now I'm looking, what are all the vehicles they're currently doing to try to get that result here? Okay, why is mine better? Okay, I'm gonna make a switch, I'm gonna switch them from their current vehicle to my new vehicle. Now I've got that, what is the offer I create that does that thing? Okay, now they invest in that, it breaks away all the price commoditization of it, makes it so I can charge whatever I want. I can be the highest price leader in town and it actually serves them higher. A phone by itself doesn't do anything, okay? My kids have, well actually I don't let my kids have phones. Most kids on the street have phones, doesn't do anything for them. They can call on the phone, they can play games all day. This phone would actually serve my person at a higher level. They can go through all my training, they can vox me, they can get bookmarks, all my vendors, they can like, this becomes super valuable to me. I can actually serve them at a higher level and because I can charge them more and everything else becomes better, okay? So that's the way I understand it, like this is the key to this whole thing, you understand these pieces and from that comes out an offer. And when you create an irresistible offer, people have to say yes, okay? Now there's other stuff, I'm not gonna spend too much time today going into that, but there's other pieces like, like what are the, when you create this offer, like what does it look like, what do you do, right? Like there's the product, and there's different strategies and things we can go deeper on, but the biggest thing is I'm always just thinking like, how can I serve this person at the highest level? I legitimately want them to get the best result I can, right? And so when I understand that, like that's my goal, I gotta get them the best result possible, like how can I serve them? Like what are the things I need to do? When we did the 10X, when we sold it, the 10X event, some of you guys may know, it's been the first year's event and the next year event, it was more expensive the second year, why? Because like how, like I saw what people struggled with over the last year, I'm like how do I make this offer better? How do I crank up the software? How do I make it sexier? How do I make it better? Like what else can I offer people? Okay, and I was like, okay, thinking about like what are all the things that need to be successful? Like oh they get stuck with traffic, so I went, gave them the traffic seekers course, and like the whole offer is crazy, by the time this thing is done, they're looking at like, I can't not fail. If I honestly believe that this is the new opportunity that's gonna get me to this place, that gives me everything I need. I can't fail if I had that offer. I need people to fill that way at the end of it. If they do, they're like, they have to buy, right? And so spend time on this part of it you guys. Spend time really creating this offer in a way that's just like man, it gives them everything they possibly need to be successful with a new opportunity that you're plugging them into. Don't hold things back, like just figure that out, because if you can serve this person the highest level, they'll continue to buy from you over and over in the future, they'll buy other things. The last thing I'm gonna share is this concept. I did a video there today for one of my higher end coaching programs called Offer Hacking. And so a lot of you guys, this may be the first time you've ever done this, right? And you're like, I don't know how to create an offer. And I understand that. So the biggest thing I can say is, go and look at, go offer hack people. What that means is go look at what other people are selling. Okay, now we're gonna be offer hacking me. You guys will see my presentation here in a couple hours and then go through slide by slide, the whole entire presentation. And you'll see, here's why I created this offer and how I created it. Okay, that's just one. You should go look at 10, 20, 30 other offers out there. Go to different websites, go to any of my websites, go to other people's websites, go to ClickBank and just go to all the random pages, pick random ones and watch the video and see what are the offers they're making. Look at these offers, because you're starting to get ideas of like, oh, I could do this, oh, I could do this, oh, so and so did this over here, I could do that over here. You'll give you different ideas of how you can actually create a really good offer. Because again, the better the offer is, that you make somebody, the more likely they are to buy. Say that in any kind of sales. Like, if they offer, if you look at, this is like sales 101, right? Here's you, here's them. Let me get all fancy. Okay, they've got a doll over here. You've got a new opportunity over here. Here's like a plate and then it's a light bulb, right, there's no opportunity. All sales are, is like, does this person right here think that this thing right here is worth more than their dollar? That's it. And they think that their dollar, that this thing over here is worth more than their dollar, they will trade you for. It's bartering, right? My kids keep playing this game where they get some crap from our house, like a dumb little thing, and they knock on the neighbors doors and they're like, hey, this is my water bottle. Will you trade me for something? Something, and they're like, yeah, and they trade it and they trade it and they go door to door and they try to trade it up and by the end of the day, they're like, oh, that's an amazing thing. Okay, bartering, everything we do is all based on, like, they have money, you've got this thing, do you convince them that this offer that you have is worth more than their money? They'll switch you, that's it. Right? So focus on making this offer as good as possible you can. Now there's gonna be pieces like, I go to the next section, I'm talking about the perfect webinar. Inside the perfect webinar, there's the sections we're addressing, there's pre-propos, internal beliefs, there's external beliefs, all sorts of things like that. Like creating things like this, like part of this offer should address their internal beliefs, their external beliefs, things like that. That won't make sense for most of you guys who've already read the book.
